title: helictochloa delicatula
intro: Helictochloa delicatula, also known as Wood Meadow-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helictochloa delicatula include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which are often consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
